classification.task_goal: Implement a Worker class for updating location in an Android app.
primary_constraints: Worker class must have a constructor with parameters (Context, WorkerParameters).
SharedPreferences must be passed correctly to the Worker class.
classification.reasoning: The user initially faced issues with the constructor of the Worker class and how to pass SharedPreferences. The assistant provided guidance, but the user encountered further issues. The user successfully repaired the constraints by moving the SharedPreferences instantiation into the correct method context, thus enforcing the constraints afterward.
